title: Travel Bottles Set for Toiletries, 6Pcs Leak-Proof Silicone Travel Containers, 60ml Small Mini Empty Squeeze Bottles Travel Accessories for Toiletries, Shampoos, Conditioner and Lotion (BPA Free)
features: 【All-in-One Travel Bottles Set】The travel bottle for toiletries comes with 4 pcs in total, 6x60ml squeezable silicone & PE bottles, 1 pc jar and 1 cleaning brush. Multiple ones allow you take along different beauty products and toiletries according to your requirement!

【Premium Material】The travel toiletry bottles are made of food-grade silicone and PE, soft, squeezable, refillable and reusable. They are flexible and stretchy so you can squeeze them out with a single pinch and won't deform after repeated squeezing. Perfect for assembling your toiletries while you travel!

【Leak-Proof Design】These bottles have multi-layer leak-proof design, the smooth mouth of the travel bottle set container can better prevent liquid leakage and provide protection for your luggage and clothing. And it comes with two classification labels, which you can use to mark the items in the container.

【Easy to Fill & Clean】Designed with a wide opening, which makes it easy to fill the tube with conditioner/body wash/soap. The travel bottle set comes with a funnel and brushes to help fill and clean the bottles easily. You just need to soak in warm soapy water to easily clean these cosmetic containers!

【Wide Application】Suitable for a variety of liquids such as conditioners, shampoos, body washes and more. Such a great and convenient way to store all your travel essentials. Specially compact design for travel, business travel, business trip, outdoor overnight stay camping, etc.
description: Product Description Package list: Package list: silicone bottle * 4 20g cream box * 1 Small shovel * 1 Export Fluidav Soft and squeezable bottle body, the outlet is not easy to block, and the flow is easy to control. Big Mouth Wide opening for easy filling and easy cleaning. Triple Seal Long cylindrical screw cap seals against spills. Soft Body Squeezable soft bottle body, elastic, no deformation after repeated use.
